keywords.job: Guess it! I give you a hint: I am not in this cell to clean it up! ...
keywords.news: I hardly hear any news down here.
keywords.name: My name is Partos, but you can call me Party.
keywords.party: Yeah! Come in and let's have a party.
keywords.thais: I love the city. I just wish I could see some other part of it now and then.
keywords.city: I love the city. I just wish I could see some other part of it now and then.
keywords.tibia: I love this world. I just wish I could see some other part of it now and then.
keywords.how: I am great! Free food, free room, and now and then someone coming down here to ask me silly questions. Wouldn't you love that, too?
keywords.are: I am great! Free food, free room, and now and then someone coming down here to ask me silly questions. Wouldn't you love that, too?
keywords.you: I am great! Free food, free room, and now and then someone coming down here to ask me silly questions. Wouldn't you love that, too?
keywords.sell: I would like to sell you a secret, but I'm out of business for too long.
keywords.jail: You mean that's a JAIL? They told me it's the finest hotel in town! THAT explains the lousy roomservice!
keywords.prison: You mean that's a JAIL? They told me it's the finest hotel in town! THAT explains the lousy roomservice!
keywords.crime: Bah, I did nothing serious. I just had a little fun. In Ankrahmun nobody would have cared about these kind of things...
keywords.criminal: Bah, I did nothing serious. I just had a little fun. In Ankrahmun nobody would have cared about these kind of things...
keywords.god$: The gods seldom show up down here, so don't ask me.
keywords.gods$: The gods seldom show up down here, so don't ask me.
keywords.citizen: Rich enough to spare a little, don't you agree? Well, they didn't agree.
keywords.king: Yeah, a king is a man that can rob people by law, and not by night like me.
keywords.monster: At least I am safe from them down here.
keywords.fight: Hey, most people I killed were even worse than me.
keywords.slay: Hey, most people I killed were even worse than me.
keywords.noodles: I bet one could get some fine ransom, if he dognappes this furball.
keywords.quentin: By the gods, he visits us 'criminals' now and then to 'save' us. Who is going to save me from this boredom on two legs?
keywords.army: Bah, the king's pawns. I spit on them.
keywords.time: Geee, someone stole my watch. Bad company down here.
keywords.ankrahmun: Yes, I've lived in Ankrahmun for quite some time. Ahh, good old times! ...
keywords.waterpipe: My waterpipe? I lost it. But it doesn't matter. I quit smoking anyway.

texts: Guess it! I give you a hint: I am not in this cell to clean it up! ...
